name: Chocolate Mint Figs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a small mixing bowl, combine the semisweet chocolate chips, finely chopped fresh mint, and toasted almonds.
3. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Spoon a bit of this mixture into each fig half.
5. Lightly spray or wipe a baking sheet with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
6. Place the figs on the baking sheet.
7. Bake for 15 minutes in the preheated oven.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
